title: School Admin / Classroom Management Layer
purpose: Give schools, tutoring programs, and homeschool groups a light management layer above teacher and parent tools.
core_capabilities: group students by level or language
set school defaults for privacy and competition
enable / disable app modules by program
design_rules: Keep admin workflows simple and bulk-friendly.
Support both school-wide and small-program use cases.
Do not require enterprise-level configuration for MVP.
Allow school defaults to cascade to teachers while still permitting teacher flexibility.
